subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto true knowledge when the Face of his Lord, the Most Merciful, shone forth, that the attraction of divine utterance might seize him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا الی الذی فاز بالعرفان اذ اشرق وجه ربه الرحمن لیاخذه جذب البیان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
